thread.title: Perez retakes lead in District 5 race | News | bakersfield.com
thread.title_full: Perez retakes lead in District 5 race | News | bakersfield.com

author: PETER SEGALL psegall@bakersfield.com
title: Perez retakes lead in District 5 race | News | bakersfield.com
text:
Incumbent Kern County District 5 Supervisor Leticia Perez is back in the lead in her bid for re-election against challenger Kim Salas, who had overtaken Perez by a slim margin last week.
According to the latest results Friday from the Kern County Elections Division, Perez had 14,532 votes to Salas' 14,465, a difference of 67 votes.
